name: harness-engineering-kata
description: Harness Engineering Kata - full-stack Task Board with SDD (OpenSpec) and Middle Loop

scripts.install:all: cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && ./gradlew build -x test --no-daemon || true
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
